title: Existence and uniqueness result for an abstract nonlinear volterra integrodifferential equation
author: Rupesh T. More
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this paper, we study the existence, uniqueness and other properties of solutions of an abstract nonlinear volterra integrodifferential equation with nonlocal condition. The tool employed in the analysis is based on application of new three steps iteration. New three steps iteration method has equally important contribution to study various properties such as dependence on initial data, closeness of solutions and dependence on parameters and functions involved therein.A new three steps iteration process introduced by V. Karakaya,Y. Atalan, K. Dogan, and NH. Bouzara (Karakaya et al., 2017).
